sentences.translation: Dina je poslala poruku prijateljici Hani.
sentences.translationEn: Dina sent a message to her friend Hanaa.

sentences.translation: Predložila je da idu u kino.
sentences.translationEn: She suggested that they go to the cinema.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْهَا عَنِ الفِيلْمِ الَّذِي تُرِيدُ مُشَاهَدَتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pitala je koji film želi gledati.
sentences.translationEn: She asked her about the film she wants to watch.

sentences.arabic: اتَّفَقَتَا عَلَى مَوْعِدِ اللِّقَاءِ أَمَامَ السِّينِمَا.
sentences.translation: Dogovorile su se za termin ispred kina.
sentences.translationEn: They agreed on a meeting time in front of the cinema.

sentences.translation: Film je bio odličan i puno su se smijale.
sentences.translationEn: The film was great and they laughed a lot.
